Entry: calibrate existing material
Title: Building Reliable AI Agents
Audience: product and engineering colleagues building Agent projects
Talk: 40 minutes
Q&A: 5 minutes

Opening, 3 minutes: AI Agents are changing work.
Prompt, 7 minutes: roles, decomposition, and output formats.
Memory, 7 minutes: short-term memory, long-term memory, and retrieval.
Tools, 7 minutes: tool choice, permissions, and failures.
Multi-Agent, 7 minutes: roles, parallelism, and arbitration.
Organization, 7 minutes: training, governance, and ROI.
Summary, 2 minutes: Prompt, Memory, Tools, Multi-Agent, and organization are all essential.
